steps.title: Use the equilateral definition
steps.content: An equilateral triangle has all three side lengths equal. The problem already gives two equal sides: $AB=5{,}740\text{ mm}$ and $BC=5{,}740\text{ mm}$.

steps.title: Make the third side match
steps.content:
To prove triangle $ABC$ is equilateral, the remaining side must also have length $5{,}740\text{ mm}$. That condition is $AC=5{,}740\text{ mm}$.
The answer is A.
